name: Karib Arts & Boutique Limited
products_services: A Jamaican handcrafted line of skin & hair care products, exclusive to Karib Arts & Boutique. aJjiva (Sanskrit for Smooth), was born after years of research and satisfied client testimonials from products created by its founder, Michelle McKay. The result, products rich with aromatherapy and restorative benefits, covers all facets of your body; captivating you from head to toe. Our ‘Face It’ series is a holistic facial therapy system, free from harsh chemicals and preservatives, designed to enable your own personalized beauty-care routine. Carefully formulated for diverse skin types, namely – Dry | Dehydrated | Mature skins; Normal | Combination Skins; and Oily | Acneic skins. These straightforward 5-step methods, makes visions of radiant, soft, supple skin effortless. The tradition of old world craftsmanship is perfected in our ‘Feel It’ series of aromatic wholesomeness. Our body bars and lotions, are blended with nutritious full-fat Goat’s Milk and infused with nourishing herbs, natural butters, and essential oils for a moisturizing fragranced experience. Our gentle soothing body scrubs makes ‘self-care’ a transformative delight. We offer an extensive assortment of hearty body-care selections to tantalize your ‘home-spa’ rapture. Our uniquely blended ‘Hair It’ series is an amalgamation of healthy conditioning oils, fortified extracts, and perfumed with essential oils. These products provides nutritive hydration, stimulates circulation to enliven growth, and deeply penetrates to detangle, making your hair, manageable and shimmering. They are ideal for relaxed, color-treated, or natural hair types and is gently enough for everyday use. Karib Arts & Boutiques’ Private Label Service has you in mind. Working collaboratively with the expertise of Michelle McKay, we bring your vision to a reality, as we manufacture on your behalf and under your company’s brand. Your opportunities are limitless, reinforced by imaginative concepts and artistic designs, channeled by the resourcefulness of our Master Blender. name: Office Outlet Limited
products_services: Office Outlet Jamaica provides high quality office equipment and solutions that assist businesses to operate more efficiently and improve employee wellness. Shred Mobile service by Office Outlet, offers a secure records destruction services that comes to you quickly and economically shreds and disposes of obsolete data that businesses are required by law to store for up to seven years. Shred Mobile service also offers a drop-off or off-site shredding for those with smaller quantities to shred. An advantage of using the Shred Mobile services is a reduction of the health risks associated with illegal ‘open-burning’, while also reducing the pressures on our over-whelmed disposal sites. Office Outlet works with its partners ensuring that all paper waste is recycled. Also, from ShredMobile is a computer hard drive destruction service that offers the degaussing & crushing of PC/Laptop hard drives, mobile phones and data tapes. Shred Mobile even offers to safely destroy uniforms, expired food products and pharmaceuticals.

name: Sankhard Company Limited
products_services: The Springvale vinaigrette are the flagship products developed with the idea of utilizing local Jamaican ingredients: primarily GUAVA, SORREL, OTAHEITI APPLE, JUNE PLUM and Spicy MANGO. These are in 8oz glasses bottles. Springvale uses fresh-sourced produce (fruits, herbs and vegetables that have recently been harvested) to make its products. The vinaigrette may be used as marinades for meat and other protein dishes thereby fulfilling the mantra of being “Your Everything Dressing”. Similarly, our line of Springvale OMD! (Oh My Dressing!) Salad Dressings showcase the diversity of Jamaican cuisine with flavours such as MANGO-GINGER, JUNE PLUM-LEMONGRASS BASIL, GUAVA-ROSEMARY, CARIBBEAN and CUCUMBER-CITRUS as well as Fruit-based THOUSAND ISLAND and CREAMY ISLAND and may also be used as dips alongside favourite party snacks; found in both 8 0z and 16 oz glass and PET bottles. In 2015 we added PUMPKIN ketchup in 8oz, 10oz, 20oz bottles and in 2016 we added the chutneys (SORREL, MANGO, JACK FRUIT and PAPAYA) IN 4oz glass bottles. The Springvale Soups are the latest initiative in the offerings; Creamy Pumpkin Coconut Soups (Regular, Spicy and with Gungo Peas) as well as, Creamy Callaloo Coconut Soups in 15oz cans and with pouches coming soon. SANKHARD also produces innovative products for other companies and support their product development, marketing and distribution processes where necessary.
